title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF WASHINGTON STREET IN ILIGAN CITY TO GENERAL EMILIO AGUINALDO STREET.

chunks.text:
H. No. 8347 / 62 OG No. 24, 4158 (June 13, 1966)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 4283, June 19, 1965 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF WASHINGTON STREET IN ILIGAN CITY TO GENERAL EMILIO AGUINALDO STREET.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. Washington Street in Iligan City shall hereafter be known and referred to as General Emilio Aguinaldo Street.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 19, 1965.
